# ia.sinc:2526
# encoding: 37  [bit64=0]
AAA
  TMP1:1 = INT_AND AL, 15
  TMP2:1 = INT_LESS 9, TMP1:1
  TMP3:1 = INT_OR TMP2:1, AF
  TMP4:1 = INT_MULT 6, TMP3:1
  TMP5:1 = INT_ADD AL, TMP4:1
  AL = INT_AND TMP5:1, 15
  AH = INT_ADD AH, TMP3:1
  CF = COPY TMP3:1
  AF = COPY TMP3:1

# ia.sinc:2527
# encoding: D5  [bit64=0]
AAD imm8
  TMP1:1 = INT_MULT imm8:1, AH
  AL = INT_ADD AL, TMP1:1
  AH = COPY 0
  SF = INT_SLESS AL, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL AL, 0
  TMP2:2 = INT_AND AL, 0xff
  TMP3:1 = POPCOUNT TMP2:2
  TMP4:1 = INT_AND TMP3:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP4:1, 0

# ia.sinc:2528
# encoding: D4  [bit64=0]
AAM imm8
  AH = INT_DIV AL, imm8:1
  AL = INT_REM AL, imm8:1
  SF = INT_SLESS AL, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL AL, 0
  TMP1:2 = INT_AND AL, 0xff
  TMP2:1 = POPCOUNT TMP1:2
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND TMP2:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP3:1, 0

# encoding: 14

  OF = INT_SCARRY AL, imm8:1

  TMP3:1 = INT_CARRY TMP2:1, TMP1:1
  CF = BOOL_OR CF, TMP3:1
  TMP4:1 = INT_SCARRY TMP2:1, TMP1:1

  SF = INT_SLESS AL, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL AL, 0
  TMP5:1 = INT_AND AL, -1
  TMP6:1 = POPCOUNT TMP5:1
  TMP7:1 = INT_AND TMP6:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP7:1, 0

# ia.sinc:3049
# encoding: 3C
CMP AL,imm8
  CF = INT_LESS AL, imm8:1
  OF = INT_SBORROW AL, imm8:1
  TMP1:1 = INT_SUB AL, imm8:1
  SF = INT_SLESS TMP1:1, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL TMP1:1, 0

  TMP2:1 = POPCOUNT TMP1:Reg8.size
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND TMP2:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP3:1, 0

# ia.sinc:4515
# encoding: 9E
SAHF
  TMP1:1 = INT_AND AH, -0x80
  SF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP1:1, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND AH, 0x40
  ZF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP2:1, 0
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND AH, 0x10
  AF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP3:1, 0
  TMP4:1 = INT_AND AH, 4
  PF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP4:1, 0
  TMP5:1 = INT_AND AH, 1
  CF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP5:1, 0

# ia.sinc:4521
# encoding: D6  [bit64=0]

# ia.sinc:4523
# encoding: D0 /7
SAR rm8,n1
  # BUILD n1
  # BUILD rm8
  CF = INT_AND rm8:rm8.size, 1
  OF = COPY 0
  rm8:rm8.size = INT_SRIGHT rm8:rm8.size, 1
  SF = INT_SLESS rm8:rm8.size, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL rm8:rm8.size, 0
  TMP1:rm8.size = INT_AND rm8:rm8.size, 0xff
  TMP2:1 = POPCOUNT TMP1:rm8.size
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND TMP2:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP3:1, 0

  TMP28:1 = INT_EQUAL TMP27:1, 0
  TMP29:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP16:1
  TMP30:1 = INT_AND TMP29:1, PF
  TMP31:1 = INT_AND TMP16:1, TMP28:1
  PF = INT_OR TMP30:1, TMP31:1

# lockable.sinc:344
# encoding: 0F BB  [opsize=0]
BTClockx Mem,Reg16
  # BUILD Reg16
  # BUILD lockx
  # BUILD Mem
  TMP1:Mem.size = INT_SEXT Reg16:Reg16.size
  TMP2:Mem.size = INT_SRIGHT TMP1:Mem.size, 3
  TMP3:Mem.size = INT_ADD Mem:Mem.size, TMP2:Mem.size
  TMP4:Reg16.size = INT_AND Reg16:Reg16.size, 7
  TMP5:1 = *TMP3:Mem.size
  TMP6:1 = INT_RIGHT TMP5:1, TMP4:Reg16.size
  TMP7:1 = INT_AND TMP6:1, 1
  TMP8:1 = *TMP3:Mem.size

  OF = INT_SBORROW m64:m64.size, Reg64:Reg64.size
  TMP2:m64.size = INT_SUB m64:m64.size, Reg64:Reg64.size
  TMP3:1 = INT_LESS TMP2:m64.size, TMP1:m64.size
  CF = BOOL_OR CF, TMP3:1
  TMP4:1 = INT_SBORROW TMP2:m64.size, TMP1:m64.size
  OF = BOOL_XOR OF, TMP4:1
  m64:m64.size = INT_SUB TMP2:m64.size, TMP1:m64.size
  SF = INT_SLESS m64:m64.size, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL m64:m64.size, 0
  TMP5:m64.size = INT_AND m64:m64.size, 0xff
  TMP6:1 = POPCOUNT TMP5:m64.size
  TMP7:1 = INT_AND TMP6:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP7:1, 0
  # BUILD unlock

# avx512.sinc:531
# encoding: 5A  [mandover=1, prefix_f2=1, repneprefx=1, rexWprefix=1, vexMMMMM=16, vexMode=1, xacquireprefx=1]
VCVTSD2SS XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m64
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m64
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vcvtsd2ss_avx512f(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m64:XmmReg2_m64.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:4 = INT_MULT TMP3:4, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP6:1 = INT_AND TMP5:1, 1
  TMP7:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP6:1
  TMP8:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP7:1
  TMP9:4 = INT_MULT TMP8:4, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_ADD TMP4:4, TMP9:4
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:581
# encoding: 5A  [mandover=2, prefix_f3=1, repprefx=1, vexMMMMM=16, vexMode=1, xreleaseprefx=1]
VCVTSS2SD XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m32
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m32
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vcvtss2sd_avx512f(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m32:XmmReg2_m32.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:8 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:8 = INT_MULT TMP3:8, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP6:1 = INT_AND TMP5:1, 1
  TMP7:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP6:1
  TMP8:8 = INT_ZEXT TMP7:1
  TMP9:8 = INT_MULT TMP8:8, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_ADD TMP4:8, TMP9:8
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:1747
# encoding: 10 byte[1]&C0=C0  [mandover=1, prefix_f2=1, repneprefx=1, rexWprefix=1, vexMMMMM=16, vexMode=1, xacquireprefx=1]
VMOVSD XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = COPY XmmReg2:XmmReg2.size
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:8 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:8 = INT_MULT TMP3:8, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP6:1 = INT_AND TMP5:1, 1
  TMP7:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP6:1
  TMP8:8 = INT_ZEXT TMP7:1
  TMP9:8 = INT_MULT TMP8:8, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_ADD TMP4:8, TMP9:8
  ZmmResult[8:8] = COPY evexV5_XmmReg:8
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:1758
# encoding: 10  [mandover=1, prefix_f2=1, repneprefx=1, rexWprefix=1, vexMMMMM=16, vexMode=1, xacquireprefx=1]
VMOVSD XmmReg1XmmOpMask, m64
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD m64
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  TMP1:8 = COPY m64:m64.size
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP2:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND TMP2:1, 1
  TMP4:8 = INT_ZEXT TMP3:1
  TMP5:8 = INT_MULT TMP4:8, TMP1:8
  TMP6:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP7:1 = INT_AND TMP6:1, 1
  TMP8:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP7:1
  TMP9:8 = INT_ZEXT TMP8:1
  TMP10:8 = INT_MULT TMP9:8, ZmmMask
  TMP1:8 = INT_ADD TMP5:8, TMP10:8

  # BUILD VPCMPB_op
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m128
  # BUILD AVXOpMask
  # BUILD KReg_reg
  # BUILD VPCMPB_mon

  # BUILD XmmOpMask32
  ZmmReg2:ZmmReg2.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:13903
# encoding: 58  [mandover=2, prefix_f3=1, repprefx=1, vexMMMMM=20, vexMode=1, xreleaseprefx=1]
VADDSH XmmReg1 XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vaddsh_avx512fp16(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m16:XmmReg2_m16.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY XmmReg1:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

VCVTSD2SH XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m64
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m64
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vcvtsd2sh_avx512fp16(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m64:XmmReg2_m64.size)

  # BUILD XmmOpMask

  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1

  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY XmmReg1:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

  # BUILD ZmmReg2_m512_m16bcst
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vdivph_avx512fp16(evexV5_ZmmReg:evexV5_ZmmReg.size, ZmmReg2_m512_m16bcst:ZmmReg2_m512_m16bcst.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size
  # BUILD ZmmOpMask16

# avx512.sinc:14991
# encoding: 5E  [mandover=2, prefix_f3=1, repprefx=1, vexMMMMM=20, vexMode=1, xreleaseprefx=1]
VDIVSH XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vdivsh_avx512fp16(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m16:XmmReg2_m16.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY evexV5_XmmReg:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# encoding: 57  [mandover=1, prefix_f2=1, repneprefx=1, vexMMMMM=12, vexMode=1, xacquireprefx=1]
VFCMADDCSH XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m32
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m32
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vfcmaddcsh_avx512fp16(XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size, evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m32:XmmReg2_m32.size)

  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:4 = INT_MULT TMP3:4, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1

  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:4, TMP7:4
  ZmmResult[4:12] = COPY evexV5_XmmReg:12
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:15393
# encoding: 99  [mandover=4, prefix_66=1, vexMMMMM=12, vexMode=1]
VFMADD132SH XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vfmadd132sh_avx512fp16(XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size, evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m16:XmmReg2_m16.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY XmmReg1:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:15742
# encoding: 9B  [mandover=4, prefix_66=1, vexMMMMM=12, vexMode=1]
VFMSUB132SH XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vfmsub132sh_avx512fp16(XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size, evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m16:XmmReg2_m16.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY XmmReg1:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

  # BUILD ZmmReg2
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2

  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg2:XmmReg2.size

  TMP20:2 = INT_MULT TMP19:2, ZmmMask[2:2]
  ZmmResult[2:2] = INT_ADD TMP14:2, TMP20:2
  TMP21:XmmOpMask.size = INT_RIGHT XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 2
  TMP22:1 = SUBPIECE TMP21:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP23:1 = INT_AND TMP22:1, 1
  TMP24:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP23:1

# ia.sinc:2625
# encoding: 63  [bit64=0, opsize=3]

  # BUILD rm16

  TMP2:Reg16.size = INT_AND Reg16:Reg16.size, 3
  TMP3:Reg16.size = INT_SUB TMP2:Reg16.size, TMP1:rm16.size
  ZF = INT_SLESS 0, TMP3:Reg16.size
  TMP4:Reg16.size = INT_ZEXT CF
  TMP5:Reg16.size = INT_MULT TMP4:Reg16.size, TMP3:Reg16.size
  rm16:rm16.size = INT_ADD rm16:rm16.size, TMP5:Reg16.size

# ia.sinc:2628

  # BUILD m16
  # BUILD Reg16

  # BUILD rm16

# ia.sinc:4769
# encoding: 2C
SUB AL,imm8
  CF = INT_LESS AL, imm8:1
  OF = INT_SBORROW AL, imm8:1
  AL = INT_SUB AL, imm8:1
  SF = INT_SLESS AL, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL AL, 0
  TMP1:1 = INT_AND AL, -1
  TMP2:1 = POPCOUNT TMP1:1
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND TMP2:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP3:1, 0

# ia.sinc:4770
# encoding: 2D  [opsize=0]

  OF = INT_SBORROW AL, imm16:2
  AL = INT_SUB AL, imm16:2
  SF = INT_SLESS AL, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL AL, 0
  TMP1:2 = INT_AND AL, 0xff
  TMP2:1 = POPCOUNT TMP1:2
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND TMP2:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP3:1, 0

PMADDWD XmmReg, m128
  # BUILD m128
  # BUILD XmmReg
  XmmReg:XmmReg.size = pmaddwd(XmmReg:XmmReg.size, m128:m128.size)

# ia.sinc:8510
# encoding: 0F F5 byte[2]&C0=C0  [prefix_66=1]
PMADDWD XmmReg1, XmmReg2
  # BUILD XmmReg2
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size = pmaddwd(XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size, XmmReg2:XmmReg2.size)

# ia.sinc:8512
# encoding: 0F EE
PMAXSW mmxreg1, mmxreg2_m64
  # BUILD mmxreg2_m64
  TMP1:8 = COPY mmxreg2_m64:mmxreg2_m64.size
  TMP2:1 = INT_SLESS mmxreg1:2, TMP1:2
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, TMP1:2
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, mmxreg1:2
  mmxreg1:2 = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  TMP8:1 = INT_SLESS mmxreg1:2, TMP9:2
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP8:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, TMP9:2
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP8:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, mmxreg1:2
  mmxreg1:2 = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  TMP10:1 = INT_SLESS mmxreg1:2, TMP11:2
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP10:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, TMP11:2
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP10:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, mmxreg1:2
  mmxreg1:2 = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  TMP12:1 = INT_SLESS mmxreg1:2, TMP13:2
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP12:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, TMP13:2
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP12:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, mmxreg1:2
  mmxreg1:2 = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2

# encoding: 0F 38 17  [prefix_66=1]
PTEST XmmReg, m128
  # BUILD m128
  # BUILD XmmReg
  TMP1:16 = COPY m128:m128.size
  TMP2:16 = INT_AND TMP1:16, XmmReg:XmmReg.size
  ZF = INT_EQUAL TMP2:16, 0
  TMP3:XmmReg.size = INT_NEGATE XmmReg:XmmReg.size
  TMP4:16 = INT_AND TMP1:16, TMP3:XmmReg.size
  CF = INT_EQUAL TMP4:16, 0
  AF = COPY 0
  OF = COPY 0
  PF = COPY 0
  SF = COPY 0

# ia.sinc:10206
# encoding: 0F 38 17 byte[3]&C0=C0  [prefix_66=1]

  # BUILD XmmReg1
  TMP1:XmmReg2.size = INT_AND XmmReg2:XmmReg2.size, XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  ZF = INT_EQUAL TMP1:XmmReg2.size, 0
  TMP2:XmmReg1.size = INT_NEGATE XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  TMP3:XmmReg2.size = INT_AND XmmReg2:XmmReg2.size, TMP2:XmmReg1.size
  CF = INT_EQUAL TMP3:XmmReg2.size, 0
  AF = COPY 0
  OF = COPY 0
  PF = COPY 0
  SF = COPY 0

  TMP4:Reg16.size = INT_AND Reg16:Reg16.size, 7

  # BUILD unlock

  # BUILD Reg8
  # BUILD m8
  # BUILD lockx
  TMP1:m8.size = COPY m8:m8.size
  CF = INT_LESS AL, TMP1:m8.size
  OF = INT_SBORROW AL, TMP1:m8.size
  TMP2:1 = INT_SUB AL, TMP1:m8.size
  SF = INT_SLESS TMP2:1, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL TMP2:1, 0
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND TMP2:1, -1
  TMP4:1 = POPCOUNT TMP3:1
  TMP5:1 = INT_AND TMP4:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP5:1, 0
  if (ZF) goto label[0x0]
  AL = COPY TMP1:m8.size
  goto label[0x1]
  label[0x0]:
  m8:m8.size = COPY Reg8:Reg8.size
  label[0x1]:
  # BUILD unlock

  # BUILD lockx

  TMP3:m64.size = INT_LEFT TMP2:m64.size, 0x20

  TMP5:m64.size = INT_OR TMP3:m64.size, TMP4:m64.size

  goto label[0x1]

  TMP8:m64.size = INT_LEFT TMP7:m64.size, 0x20
  TMP9:m64.size = INT_ZEXT BL
  m64:m64.size = INT_OR TMP8:m64.size, TMP9:m64.size
  label[0x1]:

  # BUILD XmmReg1
  TMP1:XmmReg2_m128.size = COPY XmmReg2_m128:XmmReg2_m128.size

  TMP3:XmmReg2_m128.size = INT_AND TMP1:XmmReg2_m128.size, TMP2:XmmReg1.size
  TMP4:XmmReg2_m128.size = INT_RIGHT TMP3:XmmReg2_m128.size, 0x1f

  TMP6:1 = INT_AND TMP5:1, 1
  TMP7:XmmReg2_m128.size = INT_RIGHT TMP3:XmmReg2_m128.size, 0x3f
  TMP8:1 = SUBPIECE TMP7:XmmReg2_m128.size, 0

  TMP13:1 = INT_AND TMP12:1, 1
  TMP14:1 = INT_OR TMP10:1, TMP13:1
  TMP15:XmmReg2_m128.size = INT_RIGHT TMP3:XmmReg2_m128.size, 0x7f
  TMP16:1 = SUBPIECE TMP15:XmmReg2_m128.size, 0
  TMP17:1 = INT_AND TMP16:1, 1
  TMP18:1 = INT_OR TMP14:1, TMP17:1
  ZF = INT_EQUAL TMP18:1, 0
  TMP19:XmmReg1.size = INT_NEGATE TMP2:XmmReg1.size

  TMP21:XmmReg2_m128.size = INT_RIGHT TMP20:XmmReg2_m128.size, 0x1f
  TMP22:1 = SUBPIECE TMP21:XmmReg2_m128.size, 0
  TMP23:1 = INT_AND TMP22:1, 1
  TMP24:XmmReg2_m128.size = INT_RIGHT TMP20:XmmReg2_m128.size, 0x3f

# avx512.sinc:531
# encoding: 5A  [mandover=1, prefix_f2=1, repneprefx=1, rexWprefix=1, vexMMMMM=16, vexMode=1, xacquireprefx=1]
VCVTSD2SS XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m64
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m64
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vcvtsd2ss_avx512f(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m64:XmmReg2_m64.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:4 = INT_MULT TMP3:4, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP6:1 = INT_AND TMP5:1, 1
  TMP7:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP6:1
  TMP8:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP7:1
  TMP9:4 = INT_MULT TMP8:4, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_ADD TMP4:4, TMP9:4
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

  ZmmMask = INT_ZEXT m32:m32.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP2:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND TMP2:1, 1
  TMP4:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP3:1
  TMP5:4 = INT_MULT TMP4:4, TMP1:4
  TMP6:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP7:1 = INT_AND TMP6:1, 1
  TMP8:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP7:1
  TMP9:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP8:1
  TMP10:4 = INT_MULT TMP9:4, ZmmMask
  m32:m32.size = INT_ADD TMP5:4, TMP10:4

  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask64
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:13903
# encoding: 58  [mandover=2, prefix_f3=1, repprefx=1, vexMMMMM=20, vexMode=1, xreleaseprefx=1]
VADDSH XmmReg1 XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vaddsh_avx512fp16(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m16:XmmReg2_m16.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY XmmReg1:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:14514
# encoding: 5A  [mandover=1, prefix_f2=1, repneprefx=1, rexWprefix=1, vexMMMMM=20, vexMode=1, xacquireprefx=1]
VCVTSD2SH XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m64
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m64
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vcvtsd2sh_avx512fp16(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m64:XmmReg2_m64.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY XmmReg1:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:14526
# encoding: 5A  [mandover=2, prefix_f3=1, repprefx=1, vexMMMMM=20, vexMode=1, xreleaseprefx=1]

  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1

# avx512.sinc:14991
# encoding: 5E  [mandover=2, prefix_f3=1, repprefx=1, vexMMMMM=20, vexMode=1, xreleaseprefx=1]
VDIVSH XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vdivsh_avx512fp16(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m16:XmmReg2_m16.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY evexV5_XmmReg:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# avx512.sinc:15742
# encoding: 9B  [mandover=4, prefix_66=1, vexMMMMM=12, vexMode=1]
VFMSUB132SH XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vfmsub132sh_avx512fp16(XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size, evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m16:XmmReg2_m16.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY XmmReg1:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask16
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

  # BUILD ZmmReg1

# avx512.sinc:17692
# encoding: 5C  [mandover=2, prefix_f3=1, repprefx=1, vexMMMMM=20, vexMode=1, xreleaseprefx=1]
VSUBSH XmmReg1XmmOpMask, evexV5_XmmReg, XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD ZmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2_m16
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  ZmmResult = vsubsh_avx512fp16(evexV5_XmmReg:evexV5_XmmReg.size, XmmReg2_m16:XmmReg2_m16.size)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask
  TMP1:1 = SUBPIECE XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP2:1 = INT_AND TMP1:1, 1
  TMP3:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP2:1
  TMP4:2 = INT_MULT TMP3:2, ZmmResult
  TMP5:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP2:1
  TMP6:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP5:1
  TMP7:2 = INT_MULT TMP6:2, ZmmMask
  ZmmResult = INT_OR TMP4:2, TMP7:2
  ZmmResult[2:14] = COPY XmmReg1:14
  ZmmReg1:ZmmReg1.size = INT_ZEXT ZmmResult

# encoding: 1D byte[1]&C0=C0  [mandover=4, prefix_66=1, vexL=0, vexMMMMM=24, vexMode=1]

  # BUILD ZmmReg2
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  # BUILD XmmReg2
  ZmmResult = vcvtps2ph_avx512vl(XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size, imm8:1)
  ZmmMask = COPY XmmReg2:XmmReg2.size
  # BUILD XmmOpMask

  TMP13:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP12:1
  TMP14:2 = INT_MULT TMP13:2, ZmmResult[2:2]
  TMP15:XmmOpMask.size = INT_RIGHT XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 1
  TMP16:1 = SUBPIECE TMP15:XmmOpMask.size, 0

  TMP18:1 = BOOL_NEGATE TMP17:1
  TMP19:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP18:1
  TMP20:2 = INT_MULT TMP19:2, ZmmMask[2:2]
  ZmmResult[2:2] = INT_ADD TMP14:2, TMP20:2
  TMP21:XmmOpMask.size = INT_RIGHT XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 2
  TMP22:1 = SUBPIECE TMP21:XmmOpMask.size, 0
  TMP23:1 = INT_AND TMP22:1, 1
  TMP24:2 = INT_ZEXT TMP23:1
  TMP25:2 = INT_MULT TMP24:2, ZmmResult[4:2]
  TMP26:XmmOpMask.size = INT_RIGHT XmmOpMask:XmmOpMask.size, 2
  TMP27:1 = SUBPIECE TMP26:XmmOpMask.size, 0

# adx.sinc:1
# encoding: 0F 38 F6  [prefix_66=1]
ADCX Reg32, rm32
  # BUILD rm32
  # BUILD Reg32
  TMP1:5 = INT_ZEXT Reg32:Reg32.size
  TMP2:5 = INT_ZEXT rm32:rm32.size
  TMP3:5 = INT_ADD TMP1:5, TMP2:5
  TMP4:5 = INT_ZEXT CF
  TMP5:5 = INT_ADD TMP3:5, TMP4:5
  TMP6:1 = SUBPIECE TMP5:5, 4
  CF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP6:1, 0
  Reg32:Reg32.size = COPY TMP5:4
  # BUILD check_Reg32_dest

# adx.sinc:18
# encoding: 0F 38 F6  [prefix_f3=1, repprefx=1, xreleaseprefx=1]
ADOX Reg32, rm32
  # BUILD rm32
  # BUILD Reg32
  TMP1:5 = INT_ZEXT Reg32:Reg32.size
  TMP2:5 = INT_ZEXT rm32:rm32.size
  TMP3:5 = INT_ADD TMP1:5, TMP2:5
  TMP4:5 = INT_ZEXT OF
  TMP5:5 = INT_ADD TMP3:5, TMP4:5
  TMP6:1 = SUBPIECE TMP5:5, 4
  OF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP6:1, 0
  Reg32:Reg32.size = COPY TMP5:4
  # BUILD check_Reg32_dest

# clwb.sinc:2
# encoding: 0F AE /6  [prefix_66=1]
CLWB m8
  # BUILD m8
  clwb(m8:m8.size)

# pclmulqdq.sinc:19
# encoding: 0F 3A 44 byte[3]&C0=C0 00  [prefix_66=1]
PCLMULLQLQDQ XmmReg1, XmmReg2
  # BUILD XmmReg2
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  TMP1:16 = INT_ZEXT XmmReg1:8
  TMP2:16 = INT_ZEXT XmmReg2:8
  TMP3:4 = COPY 0
  TMP4:16 = COPY 0
  label[0x0]:
  TMP5:1 = INT_LESS 0x3f, TMP3:4
  if (TMP5:1) goto label[0x1]
  TMP6:16 = INT_LEFT 1, TMP3:4
  TMP7:16 = INT_AND TMP1:16, TMP6:16
  TMP8:1 = INT_EQUAL TMP7:16, 0
  if (TMP8:1) goto label[0x2]
  TMP9:16 = INT_LEFT TMP2:16, TMP3:4
  TMP4:16 = INT_XOR TMP4:16, TMP9:16
  label[0x2]:
  TMP3:4 = INT_ADD TMP3:4, 1
  goto label[0x0]
  label[0x1]:
  XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size = COPY TMP4:16

# pclmulqdq.sinc:26
# encoding: 0F 3A 44 byte[3]&C0=C0 01  [prefix_66=1]
PCLMULHQLQDQ XmmReg1, XmmReg2
  # BUILD XmmReg2
  # BUILD XmmReg1
  TMP1:16 = INT_ZEXT XmmReg1:8
  TMP2:16 = INT_ZEXT XmmReg2:8
  TMP3:4 = COPY 0
  TMP4:16 = COPY 0
  label[0x0]:
  TMP5:1 = INT_LESS 0x3f, TMP3:4
  if (TMP5:1) goto label[0x1]
  TMP6:16 = INT_LEFT 1, TMP3:4
  TMP7:16 = INT_AND TMP1:16, TMP6:16
  TMP8:1 = INT_EQUAL TMP7:16, 0
  if (TMP8:1) goto label[0x2]
  TMP9:16 = INT_LEFT TMP2:16, TMP3:4

  # BUILD Reg32
